signal_title: Public Consultation on Transparency Reporting Under the DSA
risk_rationale: The regulatory signal indicates a requirement for enhanced transparency reporting under the DSA, which aligns with existing obligations but may require additional data points and format changes.

compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Providers must publish periodic transparency reports including data on orders from authorities and performance of automated moderation systems.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The current baseline requires biannual reports but may not fully cover the specific data points and format required by the new regulation.

remediations.title: Enhance Transparency Reporting for DSA Compliance
remediations.description: Update the transparency reporting process to include specific data on orders from authorities and the performance of automated moderation systems as required by the new DSA guidelines.
acceptance_criteria: Transparency reports include data on orders from authorities.
Reports detail the performance metrics of automated moderation systems.
Reports are formatted according to the new DSA templates.

business_impact: Failure to comply with the enhanced transparency requirements could lead to regulatory scrutiny and potential fines, impacting TikTok's operations in the EU market.
recommended_actions: Conduct a gap analysis to identify specific data points required by the new DSA templates.
Coordinate with the engineering team to implement necessary changes to the transparency reporting system.
Engage with EU regulatory bodies to ensure alignment with the new reporting requirements.
